prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford Duratec 3.2L SI6 (engine code: AJ-V6) with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 60mm compressor inducer) paired with a custom intercooler from Bell Auto Services (UK-spec, 600x300x76mm core) and a Pierburg CWA100 high-flow water pump for auxiliary cooling. Supporting mods include a forged crankshaft from JE Pistons (86mm stroke, 94mm bore) and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio) with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods.

Full custom ECU remapping via a standalone Syvecs S6Plus ECU with bespoke calibration for the AJ-V6, including launch control, anti-lag, and flex-fuel compatibility (E85). Fuel system upgrades include a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (1000cc/min), and a custom fuel rail from Radium Engineering with AN-6 fittings. Exhaust system features a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back setup from Scorpion Exhausts with a 50mm wastegate dump tube and a secondary catalytic converter delete (for off-road use only).

Suspension overhaul with a full Ohlins Road & Track DFV kit (coilovers) specifically valved for the Freelander 2’s 5-link rear suspension geometry, paired with polybushings from SuperPro (part numbers: SPF1145K for front control arms, SPF1146K for rear trailing arms). Braking system includes AP Racing CP8650 front calipers (6-piston, 380mm discs) and CP8651 rear calipers (4-piston, 355mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines. Differential upgrades include a Quaife ATB helical LSD for the rear (part number: QDF7J) and a custom front diff brace from Allmakes 4x4.
estetica: Full widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny-inspired kit from Overfinch (UK), featuring extended carbon fiber fenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear), a custom front splitter with integrated LED turn signals, and a rear diffuser with dual 3.5-inch exhaust outlets. The kit includes a custom hood with a functional heat extractor and a carbon fiber roof panel (replacing the OEM steel roof) to reduce weight by 12kg.

Wheel setup includes custom 19x10 ET25 front and 19x11 ET15 rear forged wheels from Rotiform (model: LAS-R, matte bronze finish) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Fender flares are rolled and pulled to accommodate the wider track, with custom inner fender liners from Rally Armor (UK) for additional protection.

Interior upgrades include a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards from Katzkin (custom stitching in Land Rover Racing Green), a custom roll cage from Safety Devices (UK, FIA-approved, bolt-in design with integrated harness bar), and Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses). The steering wheel is replaced with a Momo Prototipo (350mm diameter, suede grip) with a quick-release hub, and the OEM gauge cluster is swapped for a digital AIM MXS Strada dash (12-inch display, configurable shift lights, and data logging).
